title: Reinventing the hot tub
subtitle: Discover our Garden Thermal Spa. A masterpiece of elegant design, uniquely crafted with ancient materials.
content:
## Choose Earth, Ditch Plastic

Forget about plastic materials!

The magic of outdoor thermal baths made with natural materials used by the ancient Egyptians and Romans, crafted with our exclusive technologies.

We aim to help reconnect, through a design object, the deep bond that our bodies have lost with the earth, water, fire, and air.

Our freestanding overflow tub offers water filtration, treatment, and recovery, infrared heating, and a relaxing bubble massage. It's a unique experience that will transport you back in time while you enjoy the ultimate modern comfort.
